[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100101010 4
1 010000100 2
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 110101000 4
6 100010001 3
7 010001000 2
